---
title: "Walter Deeble Boger"
---

## Walter Deeble Boger

**Dates:** (b. 15 Feb 1832)

### Description

landowner

### Biography

He was a member of a gentry family living at Wolsdon, Antony, Cornwall, where they were presumably known to the Yonges of Puslinch and Antony. [LG 1906]

### Letters

- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
